description_long: This is a large, dark-colored Chesterfield-style sofa with a classic and elegant design. The sofa features a continuous, high backrest and armrests that are rolled and generously padded, creating a uniform, enveloping silhouette. The upholstery is deeply tufted across the backrest and arms, giving it a luxurious, textured appearance, while the seat consists of three distinct, thick cushions. The legs are short, rounded, and likely made of wood, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed for stability. The overall form is robust and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The sofa's dark fabric and traditional styling make it a statement piece in any setting.
description: A large, dark Chesterfield-style sofa with deep tufting, rolled armrests, and three thick seat cushions. Its classic design and solid build make it both elegant and inviting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rolled armrest and the depth of the sofa, highlighting the tufted backrest and arm.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and both rolled armrests, emphasizing the sofa's length.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same rolled armrest and tufted detailing visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three seat cushions, the full width of the tufted backrest, and both rolled armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform, attached seat cushions with a continuous, deeply tufted backrest; cushions are evenly spaced and fixed in place.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high, and rolled armrests that are continuous with the backrest, heavily padded, and feature deep tufting for a classic Chesterfield look.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, rounded, wooden legs positioned at the corners and along the base, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and curved backrest with deep button tufting, integrated with the armrests for a seamless, enveloping form.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a deeply tufted, diamond-patterned texture on the backrest and arms; seat cushions are smooth and unpatterned.
